imageAlt: SC: Move from Sensibill to Textract roadmap item preview image
title: SC: Move from Sensibill to Textract
summaryBody: Moving away from Sensibill to a self-run service will save significant cost (estimated $75,000 → $10,00 per year), and increase the value proposition of SC by allowing faster extraction and extracting additional data.
detailBody: Moving away from Sensibill to a self-run service will save significant cost (estimated $75,000 → $10,00 per year), and increase the value proposition of SC by allowing faster extraction and extracting additional data.
